personas.label: Male web-novel strategist
personas.lens: Compulsion, cliffhangers, growth fantasy, unlock pacing
personas.benchmark: Solo Leveling power curve, Game Dev Story unlock cadence
personas.concern: The next visible payoff must arrive before early menus feel like work.

personas.label: Female web-novel strategist
personas.lens: Emotional reward, readable stakes, session curiosity
personas.benchmark: Serialized romance/fantasy cliffhanger retention
personas.concern: Company identity and human stakes need warmer beats between metrics.

personas.label: Male literary novelist lens
personas.lens: Theme, world coherence, meaning of AI expansion
personas.benchmark: The Circle, Silicon Valley satire
personas.concern: Boundaryless expansion should produce irony and consequences, not only more numbers.

personas.label: Female literary novelist lens
personas.lens: Human cost, ethical tension, meaningful choice
personas.benchmark: Workplace ensemble fiction and ethical tech drama
personas.concern: Staff, agents, and robots should feel affected by company strategy.

personas.label: Male commercial comics creator lens
personas.lens: Visual readability, punchy beats, dashboard flow
personas.benchmark: Kairosoft pixel office readability, manga panel punchlines
personas.concern: The right-side UI must stop competing with the office scene.

personas.label: Female commercial comics creator lens
personas.lens: Company character, contrast, progression clarity
personas.benchmark: Kairosoft character silhouettes and tiny reaction moments
personas.concern: Employees and agents need clearer personality hooks before final art.

personas.label: Male children's author lens
personas.lens: Simplicity, onboarding, explanation without jargon
personas.benchmark: Friendly tycoon tutorials and simple quest strips
personas.concern: First-time players need one obvious next action at every step.

personas.label: Female children's author lens
personas.lens: Warmth, clarity, motivation, explainability
personas.benchmark: Cozy management games with gentle guidance
personas.concern: Warnings and setbacks should explain recovery without scolding the player.

personas.label: Tycoon fan
personas.lens: Optimization, progression, replayability
personas.benchmark: Game Dev Story, Startup Company, Mad Games Tycoon
personas.concern: There must be a readable reason to choose one build over another.

personas.label: Min-max player
personas.lens: Dominant strategies, exploits, dead ends
personas.benchmark: Slay the Spire route pressure and degenerate combo checks
personas.concern: Season rewards and deck loops should avoid one obvious infinite snowball.

personas.label: Casual Steam player
personas.lens: First five minutes, wishlist appeal, friction
personas.benchmark: Steam demo hook, Vampire Survivors first-session reward tempo
personas.concern: The first five minutes need a louder reward moment and fewer text blocks.

personas.label: Accessibility tester
personas.lens: Readability, controls, contrast, cognitive load
personas.benchmark: Readable management UI with low cognitive switching cost
personas.concern: Text density, button labels, and scroll areas need consistent hierarchy.

personas.label: Solo indie developer
personas.lens: Scope control, asset burden, implementation risk
personas.benchmark: One-person Steam demos that fake breadth with data templates
personas.concern: Content breadth must come from data-driven templates, not bespoke scenes.

personas.label: Female live streamer
personas.lens: Screenshot moments, chat readability, surprising events
personas.benchmark: Stream-friendly management games with visible disasters
personas.concern: Major launches and rival moves need bigger observer-readable moments.

personas.label: Mobile commuter
personas.lens: Short sessions, thumb flow, resume clarity
personas.benchmark: Portrait-friendly idle and tycoon games
personas.concern: The game needs compressed panels and clear return-state summaries.

personas.label: Female mobile strategy player
personas.lens: Menu economy, upgrade clarity, daily return hook
personas.benchmark: Compact mobile 4X and incremental strategy loops
personas.concern: Long-term goals should be visible without digging through every menu.

personas.label: Simulation balance analyst
personas.lens: Economy fairness, exploit prevention, recovery paths
personas.benchmark: RimWorld scenario pressure and management sim recovery curves
personas.concern: Bad choices should hurt, but recovery routes must remain legible.

personas.label: Female UX researcher
personas.lens: First 30 seconds, comprehension, task switching
personas.benchmark: Usability-tested onboarding for dense builder games
personas.concern: Players should understand month advance, product work, and rewards in one glance.

personas.label: Hardcore deckbuilder
personas.lens: Card identity, build variety, run-to-run mastery
personas.benchmark: Slay the Spire, Monster Train, Balatro build legibility
personas.concern: Cards must visibly change product development, not just add quiet resources.

personas.label: Female Kairosoft fan
personas.lens: Cozy office fantasy, small animated detail, upgrade joy
personas.benchmark: Game Dev Story iOS and Pocket Academy charm
personas.concern: Office growth should feel joyful even before final pixel art arrives.
